name: trigger_batch
description: Trigger multiple events in a single HTTP request to Pusher. Each event in the batch can target a different channel with a different event name and data payload. This is more efficient than making individual trigger_event calls when you need to send multiple events at once. Maximum 10 events per batch. Each event's data payload is limited to 10KB.

parameters.name: app_id
parameters.description: Your Pusher application ID. This is a path parameter in the URL.

parameters.name: batch
parameters.description: Array of event objects. Each object must have 'channel' (string), 'name' (string), and 'data' (JSON-encoded string). Optionally include 'socket_id' to exclude a client. Maximum 10 events per batch.
